title: microlicia cryptandra
intro: Microlicia cryptandra, also known as the 'Desert Lime', is a small, flowering plant native to Australia, particularly in the tropical and subtropical regions. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Research has shown that Microlicia cryptandra has antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as cardiovascular protection, anti-cancer effects, and the alleviation of respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
